products.name: Asgaard sofa
products.detail: The Asgaard sofa combines Scandinavian design aesthetics with ultimate comfort. Featuring an elegant upholstered frame that appears seamlessly crafted from one piece, complemented by plush seat and back cushions. This statement piece brings sophistication and warmth to any living space with its clean lines and premium materials.

products.name: Modular Sectional
products.detail: The Modular Sectional offers unparalleled flexibility for modern living spaces. Each piece can be rearranged to create L-shaped, linear, or corner configurations. Featuring premium fabric upholstery and deep cushions for maximum comfort, this adaptable design grows with your lifestyle and entertaining needs.

products.name: Chesterfield Classic
products.detail: The Chesterfield Classic embodies traditional elegance with its signature deep button tufting and rolled arms. Crafted from genuine top-grain leather, this iconic design features a solid hardwood frame and individually hand-applied brass nailhead trim. A sophisticated centerpiece that adds distinguished character to any room.

products.name: Velvet Luxe
products.detail: The Velvet Luxe sofa showcases opulent comfort with its plush velvet upholstery and generous proportions. Featuring channel-tufted seat cushions and elegant curved armrests, this contemporary piece offers a perfect blend of visual luxury and sink-in comfort. Gold-finished metal legs provide a glamorous finishing touch.

products.name: Minimalist Track Arm
products.detail: The Minimalist Track Arm sofa features clean lines and a streamlined silhouette perfect for modern interiors. With its straight track arms and low-profile design, this sofa maximizes seating space while maintaining an airy aesthetic. Premium linen-blend fabric and high-density foam cushions ensure lasting comfort and durability.

products.name: Curved Boomerang
products.detail: The Curved Boomerang sofa makes a bold statement with its graceful arc design that encourages conversation and creates visual interest. Upholstered in soft boucle fabric, this sculptural piece features a continuous curved backrest and tapered wooden legs. An artistic focal point that combines comfort with contemporary design.

products.name: Lawson Comfort
products.detail: The Lawson Comfort sofa features a timeless design with its simple boxed shape, padded arms, and loose back cushions. Built for everyday living, it offers exceptional comfort with deep seating and resilient foam-wrapped coil spring cushioning. Durable performance fabric makes this sofa ideal for busy households and family gatherings.

products.name: Mid-Century Modern
products.detail: The Mid-Century Modern sofa captures the essence of 1950s design with its angular silhouette, tapered wooden legs, and button-tufted seat cushions. Upholstered in rich, textured fabric, this piece features characteristic clean lines and geometric forms. A nostalgic yet timeless addition that brings vintage charm to contemporary spaces.

products.name: Recliner Elegance
products.detail: The Recliner Elegance sofa combines sophisticated style with ultimate relaxation features. Each seat includes independent power reclining mechanisms with USB charging ports. Premium leather upholstery with contrast stitching, memory foam seating, and adjustable headrests provide personalized comfort. Modern luxury meets functional innovation.

products.name: English Rolled Arm
products.detail: The English Rolled Arm sofa exemplifies classic British styling with its distinctive low, scrolled arms and deep seating. Upholstered in premium cotton-linen blend fabric, featuring eight-way hand-tied spring construction for superior support. Turned wood legs and welted seam details complete this refined, sophisticated design that never goes out of style.
